questions.question: Paul describes Jesus as having what attitude that believers should imitate?
options: He made himself nothing, taking the form of a servant
questions.answer: He made himself nothing, taking the form of a servant

questions.question: Paul says believers should work out their salvation with what?
Paul says at the name of Jesus every knee will bow.
Do nothing from selfish ambition or conceit, but in humility count others more _____ than yourselves.
Do all things without grumbling or _____.
